description_long: This apartment building complex consists of three main multi-story structures arranged along a city street, with a central courtyard and landscaped areas featuring trees and planters. The buildings have a modern, boxy design with large rectangular windows arranged in a grid pattern, and flat roofs. The facades are primarily dark, with some lighter and textured surfaces visible from the sides and rear. The street in front includes a sidewalk, crosswalk, and is flanked by parked vehicles, enhancing the urban context. The central building features a prominent balcony and a main entrance accessible from the street. The overall scene is clean, organized, and reflects contemporary urban residential architecture.
description: A modern apartment building complex with three multi-story structures, large grid windows, and a landscaped central courtyard along a city street.
description_view_0: Front view showing three main buildings, a central entrance with a balcony, street, sidewalk, and parked vehicles.
description_view_1: Side/rear angle revealing the lighter and textured surfaces, the depth of the courtyard, and the arrangement of the buildings.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back facades, flat roofs, and the alignment of the buildings with minimal street detail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the rear and side of the central building, with visible street and vehicle placement.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in a regular, symmetrical grid pattern across the facades, with consistent spacing and alignment on each floor.
